vocab.meaning: tinh thần đồng đội, sự đoàn kết trong một nhóm
vocab.example: Being part of the regional football club fostered a strong sense of esprit de corps among the players.

vocab.meaning: sự thành thục về mặt chiến thuật
vocab.example: Our coach emphasized tactical proficiency, teaching us how to read the opponent's movements effectively.

vocab.meaning: củng cố khả năng phục hồi/sự kiên cường
vocab.example: Enduring a losing streak with my teammates actually helped fortify my resilience against future failures.

vocab.meaning: một vai trò then chốt/quan trọng
vocab.example: As the team captain, I had to play a pivotal role in maintaining morale during high-stakes matches.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực hiệp đồng (phối hợp tạo nên sức mạnh lớn hơn)
vocab.example: Basketball is less about individual brilliance and more about a synergistic effort to outplay the defense.

vocab.meaning: tình bạn thân thiết, sự gắn bó
vocab.example: The camaraderie developed during those late-night practice sessions is something I cherish to this day.

vocab.meaning: đặt tham vọng cá nhân xuống dưới (vì lợi ích chung)
vocab.example: To succeed as a unit, every player must learn to subordinate personal ambition to the goals of the team.

vocab.meaning: sự thấu hiểu không cần lời nói/ý hợp tâm đầu
vocab.example: After years of playing together, there was an unspoken understanding between the midfielders and the strikers.
Our rigorous fitness regime gave us a significant competitive edge over the other schools in the district.

vocab.meaning: sự đoàn kết, tính thống nhất
vocab.example: The team displayed remarkable solidarity when we decided to protest against the unfair refereeing.
